_comment: Public directory of community Sozo Read source repos. Submissions: open a PR to Spyou/sozoread-directory. Keep each entry minimal — name + repoUrl are the only required fields.

entries.name: Spyou's manga + novel sources
entries.author: Spyou
entries.description: Official source pack: MangaDex, WeebCentral, MangaPill, MangaKatana, FreeWebNovel, NovelBin. The default repo bundled with the app.
